mergewith.fragment:
<distribution spec="bdmmprime.util.priors.ZeroExcludingRealIID" id='$(thisparam)CanonicalPrior.t:$(n)' param='@$(thisparam)Canonical.t:$(n)'> <distr spec="beast.base.spec.inference.distribution.Exponential" mean="1"/> </distribution> <operator id='$(thisparam)CanonicalScaler.t:$(n)' spec='beast.base.spec.inference.operator.ScaleOperator' scaleFactor="0.75" weight="3" parameter="@$(thisparam)Canonical.t:$(n)"/>
<distribution spec="bdmmprime.util.priors.SmartZeroExcludingRealIID" id='$(thisparam)CanonicalPriorSmart.t:$(n)' param='@$(thisparam)Canonical.t:$(n)'> <distr spec="beast.base.spec.inference.distribution.Exponential" mean="1"/> </distribution> <operator id='$(thisparam)CanonicalScalerSmart.t:$(n)' spec='bdmmprime.util.operators.SmartScaleOperator' scaleFactor="0.75" weight="3" parameter="@$(thisparam)Canonical.t:$(n)"/>

<distribution spec="bdmmprime.util.priors.ZeroExcludingRealIID" id='$(thisparam)CanonicalPrior.t:$(n)' param='@$(thisparam)Canonical.t:$(n)'> <distr spec="beast.base.spec.inference.distribution.Uniform" lower="0" upper="1"/> </distribution> <operator id='$(thisparam)CanonicalScaler.t:$(n)' spec='beast.base.spec.inference.operator.ScaleOperator' scaleFactor="0.75" weight="3" parameter="@$(thisparam)Canonical.t:$(n)"/>
<distribution spec="bdmmprime.util.priors.SmartZeroExcludingRealIID" id='$(thisparam)CanonicalPriorSmart.t:$(n)' param='@$(thisparam)Canonical.t:$(n)'> <distr spec="beast.base.spec.inference.distribution.Uniform" lower="0" upper="1"/> </distribution> <operator id='$(thisparam)CanonicalScalerSmart.t:$(n)' spec='bdmmprime.util.operators.SmartScaleOperator' scaleFactor="0.75" weight="3" parameter="@$(thisparam)Canonical.t:$(n)"/>

connect.if: inposterior(BDMMPrime.t:$(n)) and inposterior(Tree.t:$(n)) and inposterior($(thisparam)Canonical.t:$(n)) and inposterior(CanonicalBDMMPrimeParameterization.t:$(n)) and $(thisparam)Canonical.t:$(n)/estimate=true

mergewith.fragment: <distribution spec="beast.base.spec.inference.distribution.IID" id='$(thisparam)CanonicalPrior.t:$(n)' param='@$(thisparam)Canonical.t:$(n)'> <distr spec="beast.base.spec.inference.distribution.Uniform" lower="0.0" upper="10.0"/> </distribution> <operator id="$(thisparam)CanonicalOperator.t:$(n)" spec="bdmmprime.util.operators.ChangeTimeOperator" scaleFactor="0.75" windowSize="1" weight="3" changeTimes="@$(thisparam)Canonical.t:$(n)"/>

connect.if: inposterior(BDMMPrime.t:$(n)) and inposterior(Tree.t:$(n)) and inposterior($(thisparam)SPCanonical.t:$(n)) and inposterior(CanonicalBDMMPrimeParameterization.t:$(n)) and $(thisparam)Canonical.t:$(n)/estimate=true

mergewith.fragment:
<distribution spec="bdmmprime.util.priors.ZeroExcludingRealIID" id='$(thisparam)EpiPrior.t:$(n)' param='@$(thisparam)Epi.t:$(n)'> <distr spec="beast.base.spec.inference.distribution.Exponential" mean="1"/> </distribution> <operator id='$(thisparam)EpiScaler.t:$(n)' spec='beast.base.spec.inference.operator.ScaleOperator' scaleFactor="0.75" weight="3" parameter="@$(thisparam)Epi.t:$(n)"/>
<distribution spec="bdmmprime.util.priors.SmartZeroExcludingRealIID" id='$(thisparam)EpiPriorSmart.t:$(n)' param='@$(thisparam)Epi.t:$(n)'> <distr spec="beast.base.spec.inference.distribution.Exponential" mean="1"/> </distribution> <operator id='$(thisparam)EpiScalerSmart.t:$(n)' spec='bdmmprime.util.operators.SmartScaleOperator' scaleFactor="0.75" weight="3" parameter="@$(thisparam)Epi.t:$(n)"/>

<distribution spec="bdmmprime.util.priors.ZeroExcludingRealIID" id='$(thisparam)EpiPrior.t:$(n)' param='@$(thisparam)Epi.t:$(n)'> <distr spec="beast.base.spec.inference.distribution.Uniform" lower="0" upper="1"/> </distribution> <operator id='$(thisparam)EpiScaler.t:$(n)' spec='beast.base.spec.inference.operator.ScaleOperator' scaleFactor="0.75" weight="3" parameter="@$(thisparam)Epi.t:$(n)"/>
<distribution spec="bdmmprime.util.priors.SmartZeroExcludingRealIID" id='$(thisparam)EpiPriorSmart.t:$(n)' param='@$(thisparam)Epi.t:$(n)'> <distr spec="beast.base.spec.inference.distribution.Uniform" lower="0" upper="1"/> </distribution> <operator id='$(thisparam)EpiScalerSmart.t:$(n)' spec='bdmmprime.util.operators.SmartScaleOperator' scaleFactor="0.75" weight="3" parameter="@$(thisparam)Epi.t:$(n)"/>

connect.if: inposterior(BDMMPrime.t:$(n)) and inposterior(Tree.t:$(n)) and inposterior($(thisparam)Epi.t:$(n)) and inposterior(EpiBDMMPrimeParameterization.t:$(n)) and $(thisparam)Epi.t:$(n)/estimate=true

mergewith.fragment: <distribution spec="beast.base.spec.inference.distribution.IID" id='$(thisparam)EpiPrior.t:$(n)' param='@$(thisparam)Epi.t:$(n)'> <distr spec="beast.base.spec.inference.distribution.Uniform" lower="0.0" upper="10.0"/> </distribution> <operator id="$(thisparam)EpiOperator.t:$(n)" spec="bdmmprime.util.operators.ChangeTimeOperator" scaleFactor="0.75" windowSize="1" weight="3" changeTimes="@$(thisparam)Epi.t:$(n)"/>

connect.if: inposterior(BDMMPrime.t:$(n)) and inposterior(Tree.t:$(n)) and inposterior($(thisparam)SPEpi.t:$(n)) and inposterior(EpiBDMMPrimeParameterization.t:$(n)) and $(thisparam)Epi.t:$(n)/estimate=true

mergewith.fragment:
<distribution spec="bdmmprime.util.priors.ZeroExcludingRealIID" id='$(thisparam)FBDPrior.t:$(n)' param='@$(thisparam)FBD.t:$(n)'> <distr spec="beast.base.spec.inference.distribution.Exponential" mean="1"/> </distribution> <operator id='$(thisparam)FBDScaler.t:$(n)' spec='beast.base.spec.inference.operator.ScaleOperator' scaleFactor="0.75" weight="3" parameter="@$(thisparam)FBD.t:$(n)"/>
<distribution spec="bdmmprime.util.priors.SmartZeroExcludingRealIID" id='$(thisparam)FBDPriorSmart.t:$(n)' param='@$(thisparam)FBD.t:$(n)'> <distr spec="beast.base.spec.inference.distribution.Exponential" mean="1"/> </distribution> <operator id='$(thisparam)FBDScalerSmart.t:$(n)' spec='bdmmprime.util.operators.SmartScaleOperator' scaleFactor="0.75" weight="3" parameter="@$(thisparam)FBD.t:$(n)"/>

<distribution spec="bdmmprime.util.priors.ZeroExcludingRealIID" id='$(thisparam)FBDPrior.t:$(n)' param='@$(thisparam)FBD.t:$(n)'> <distr spec="beast.base.spec.inference.distribution.Uniform" lower="0" upper="1"/> </distribution> <operator id='$(thisparam)FBDScaler.t:$(n)' spec='beast.base.spec.inference.operator.ScaleOperator' scaleFactor="0.75" weight="3" parameter="@$(thisparam)FBD.t:$(n)"/>
<distribution spec="bdmmprime.util.priors.SmartZeroExcludingRealIID" id='$(thisparam)FBDPriorSmart.t:$(n)' param='@$(thisparam)FBD.t:$(n)'> <distr spec="beast.base.spec.inference.distribution.Uniform" lower="0" upper="1"/> </distribution> <operator id='$(thisparam)FBDScalerSmart.t:$(n)' spec='bdmmprime.util.operators.SmartScaleOperator' scaleFactor="0.75" weight="3" parameter="@$(thisparam)FBD.t:$(n)"/>

connect.if: inposterior(BDMMPrime.t:$(n)) and inposterior(Tree.t:$(n)) and inposterior($(thisparam)FBD.t:$(n)) and inposterior(FBDBDMMPrimeParameterization.t:$(n)) and $(thisparam)FBD.t:$(n)/estimate=true

mergewith.fragment: <distribution spec="beast.base.spec.inference.distribution.IID" id='$(thisparam)FBDPrior.t:$(n)' param='@$(thisparam)FBD.t:$(n)'> <distr spec="beast.base.spec.inference.distribution.Uniform" lower="0.0" upper="10.0"/> </distribution> <operator id="$(thisparam)FBDOperator.t:$(n)" spec="bdmmprime.util.operators.ChangeTimeOperator" scaleFactor="0.75" windowSize="1" weight="3" changeTimes="@$(thisparam)FBD.t:$(n)"/>

connect.if: inposterior(BDMMPrime.t:$(n)) and inposterior(Tree.t:$(n)) and inposterior($(thisparam)SPFBD.t:$(n)) and inposterior(FBDBDMMPrimeParameterization.t:$(n)) and $(thisparam)FBD.t:$(n)/estimate=true

mergewith.subtemplate:
<parameterization id="CanonicalBDMMPrimeParameterization.t:$(n)" spec="bdmmprime.parameterization.CanonicalParameterization"> <processLength idref="processLengthBDMMPrime.t:$(n)"/> <typeSet idref="typeSetBDMMPrime.t:$(n)"/> <birthRate id="birthRateSPCanonical.t:$(n)" spec="bdmmprime.parameterization.SkylineVectorParameter" typeSet="@typeSetBDMMPrime.t:$(n)" timesAreAges="true"> <processLength idref="processLengthBDMMPrime.t:$(n)"/> <skylineValues id="birthRateCanonical.t:$(n)" spec="beast.base.spec.inference.parameter.RealVectorParam" value="1.0" domain="NonNegativeReal"/> </birthRate> <birthRateAmongDemes id="birthRateAmongDemesSPCanonical.t:$(n)" spec="bdmmprime.parameterization.SkylineMatrixParameter" typeSet="@typeSetBDMMPrime.t:$(n)" timesAreAges="true"> <processLength idref="processLengthBDMMPrime.t:$(n)"/> <skylineValues id="birthRateAmongDemesCanonical.t:$(n)" spec="beast.base.spec.inference.parameter.RealVectorParam" value="0.0" domain="NonNegativeReal"/> </birthRateAmongDemes> <deathRate id="deathRateSPCanonical.t:$(n)" spec="bdmmprime.parameterization.SkylineVectorParameter" typeSet="@typeSetBDMMPrime.t:$(n)" timesAreAges="true"> <processLength idref="processLengthBDMMPrime.t:$(n)"/> <skylineValues id="deathRateCanonical.t:$(n)" spec="beast.base.spec.inference.parameter.RealVectorParam" value="1.0" domain="NonNegativeReal"/> </deathRate> <migrationRate id="migrationRateSPCanonical.t:$(n)" spec="bdmmprime.parameterization.SkylineMatrixParameter" typeSet="@typeSetBDMMPrime.t:$(n)" timesAreAges="true"> <processLength idref="processLengthBDMMPrime.t:$(n)"/> <skylineValues id="migrationRateCanonical.t:$(n)" spec="beast.base.spec.inference.parameter.RealVectorParam" value="1.0" domain="NonNegativeReal"/> </migrationRate>
<samplingRate id="samplingRateSPCanonical.t:$(n)" spec="bdmmprime.parameterization.SkylineVectorParameter" typeSet="@typeSetBDMMPrime.t:$(n)" timesAreAges="true"> <processLength idref="processLengthBDMMPrime.t:$(n)"/> <skylineValues id="samplingRateCanonical.t:$(n)" spec="beast.base.spec.inference.parameter.RealVectorParam" value="0.1" domain="NonNegativeReal"/> </samplingRate> <removalProb id="removalProbSPCanonical.t:$(n)" spec="bdmmprime.parameterization.SkylineVectorParameter" typeSet="@typeSetBDMMPrime.t:$(n)" timesAreAges="true"> <processLength idref="processLengthBDMMPrime.t:$(n)"/> <skylineValues id="removalProbCanonical.t:$(n)" spec="beast.base.spec.inference.parameter.RealVectorParam" value="1.0" domain="UnitInterval" estimate="false"/> </removalProb>
<rhoSampling id="rhoSamplingProbSPCanonical.t:$(n)" spec="bdmmprime.parameterization.TimedParameter" typeSet="@typeSetBDMMPrime.t:$(n)" timesAreAges="true"> <processLength idref="processLengthBDMMPrime.t:$(n)"/> </rhoSampling> </parameterization>
<param id="birthRateChangeTimesCanonical.t:$(n)" spec="beast.base.spec.inference.parameter.RealVectorParam" value="1.0" domain="Real" estimate="false"/> <param id="birthRateAmongDemesChangeTimesCanonical.t:$(n)" spec="beast.base.spec.inference.parameter.RealVectorParam" value="1.0" domain="Real" estimate="false"/> <param id="deathRateChangeTimesCanonical.t:$(n)" spec="beast.base.spec.inference.parameter.RealVectorParam" value="1.0" domain="Real" estimate="false"/> <param id="migrationRateChangeTimesCanonical.t:$(n)" spec="beast.base.spec.inference.parameter.RealVectorParam" value="1.0" domain="Real" estimate="false"/> <param id="samplingRateChangeTimesCanonical.t:$(n)" spec="beast.base.spec.inference.parameter.RealVectorParam" value="1.0" domain="Real" estimate="false"/> <param id="removalProbChangeTimesCanonical.t:$(n)" spec="beast.base.spec.inference.parameter.RealVectorParam" value="1.0" domain="Real" estimate="false"/>
<param id="rhoSamplingProbCanonical.t:$(n)" spec="beast.base.spec.inference.parameter.RealVectorParam" value="0.0" domain="UnitInterval" estimate="false"/> <param id="rhoSamplingProbTimesCanonical.t:$(n)" spec="beast.base.spec.inference.parameter.RealVectorParam" value="0.0" domain="Real" estimate="false"/>

<parameterization id="EpiBDMMPrimeParameterization.t:$(n)" spec="bdmmprime.parameterization.EpiParameterization"> <processLength idref="processLengthBDMMPrime.t:$(n)"/> <typeSet idref="typeSetBDMMPrime.t:$(n)"/> <Re id="ReSPEpi.t:$(n)" spec="bdmmprime.parameterization.SkylineVectorParameter" typeSet="@typeSetBDMMPrime.t:$(n)" timesAreAges="true"> <processLength idref="processLengthBDMMPrime.t:$(n)"/> <skylineValues id="ReEpi.t:$(n)" spec='beast.base.spec.inference.parameter.RealVectorParam' value="1.0" domain="NonNegativeReal"/> </Re> <ReAmongDemes id="ReAmongDemesSPEpi.t:$(n)" spec="bdmmprime.parameterization.SkylineMatrixParameter" typeSet="@typeSetBDMMPrime.t:$(n)" timesAreAges="true"> <processLength idref="processLengthBDMMPrime.t:$(n)"/> <skylineValues id="ReAmongDemesEpi.t:$(n)" spec='beast.base.spec.inference.parameter.RealVectorParam' value="0.0" domain="NonNegativeReal" estimate="false"/> </ReAmongDemes> <becomeUninfectiousRate id="becomeUninfectiousRateSPEpi.t:$(n)" spec="bdmmprime.parameterization.SkylineVectorParameter" typeSet="@typeSetBDMMPrime.t:$(n)" timesAreAges="true"> <processLength idref="processLengthBDMMPrime.t:$(n)"/> <skylineValues id="becomeUninfectiousRateEpi.t:$(n)" spec='beast.base.spec.inference.parameter.RealVectorParam' value="1.0" domain="NonNegativeReal"/> </becomeUninfectiousRate> <migrationRate id="migrationRateSPEpi.t:$(n)" spec="bdmmprime.parameterization.SkylineMatrixParameter" typeSet="@typeSetBDMMPrime.t:$(n)" timesAreAges="true"> <processLength idref="processLengthBDMMPrime.t:$(n)"/> <skylineValues id="migrationRateEpi.t:$(n)" spec='beast.base.spec.inference.parameter.RealVectorParam' value="1.0" domain="NonNegativeReal" estimate="false"/> </migrationRate> <samplingProportion id="samplingProportionSPEpi.t:$(n)" spec="bdmmprime.parameterization.SkylineVectorParameter" typeSet="@typeSetBDMMPrime.t:$(n)" timesAreAges="true"> <processLength idref="processLengthBDMMPrime.t:$(n)"/> <skylineValues id="samplingProportionEpi.t:$(n)" spec="beast.base.spec.inference.parameter.RealVectorParam" value="0.1" domain="UnitInterval"/> </samplingProportion> <removalProb id="removalProbSPEpi.t:$(n)" spec="bdmmprime.parameterization.SkylineVectorParameter" typeSet="@typeSetBDMMPrime.t:$(n)" timesAreAges="true"> <processLength idref="processLengthBDMMPrime.t:$(n)"/> <skylineValues id="removalProbEpi.t:$(n)" spec="beast.base.spec.inference.parameter.RealVectorParam" value="1.0" domain="UnitInterval" estimate="false"/> </removalProb>
<rhoSampling id="rhoSamplingProbSPEpi.t:$(n)" spec="bdmmprime.parameterization.TimedParameter" typeSet="@typeSetBDMMPrime.t:$(n)" timesAreAges="true"> <processLength idref="processLengthBDMMPrime.t:$(n)"/> </rhoSampling> </parameterization>
<param id="ReChangeTimesEpi.t:$(n)" spec="beast.base.spec.inference.parameter.RealVectorParam" value="1.0" domain="Real" estimate="false"/> <param id="ReAmongDemesChangeTimesEpi.t:$(n)" spec="beast.base.spec.inference.parameter.RealVectorParam" value="1.0" domain="Real" estimate="false"/> <param id="becomeUninfectiousRateChangeTimesEpi.t:$(n)" spec="beast.base.spec.inference.parameter.RealVectorParam" value="1.0" domain="Real" estimate="false"/> <param id="migrationRateChangeTimesEpi.t:$(n)" spec="beast.base.spec.inference.parameter.RealVectorParam" value="1.0" domain="Real" estimate="false"/> <param id="samplingProportionChangeTimesEpi.t:$(n)" spec="beast.base.spec.inference.parameter.RealVectorParam" value="1.0" domain="Real" estimate="false"/> <param id="removalProbChangeTimesEpi.t:$(n)" spec="beast.base.spec.inference.parameter.RealVectorParam" value="1.0" domain="Real" estimate="false"/>
<param id="rhoSamplingProbEpi.t:$(n)" spec="beast.base.spec.inference.parameter.RealVectorParam" value="0.0" domain="UnitInterval" estimate="false"/> <param id="rhoSamplingProbTimesEpi.t:$(n)" spec="beast.base.spec.inference.parameter.RealVectorParam" value="0.0" domain="Real" estimate="false"/>

<parameterization id="FBDBDMMPrimeParameterization.t:$(n)" spec="bdmmprime.parameterization.FBDParameterization"> <processLength idref="processLengthBDMMPrime.t:$(n)"/> <typeSet idref="typeSetBDMMPrime.t:$(n)"/> <diversificationRate id="diversificationRateSPFBD.t:$(n)" spec="bdmmprime.parameterization.SkylineVectorParameter" typeSet="@typeSetBDMMPrime.t:$(n)" timesAreAges="true"> <processLength idref="processLengthBDMMPrime.t:$(n)"/> <skylineValues id="diversificationRateFBD.t:$(n)" spec="beast.base.spec.inference.parameter.RealVectorParam" value="1.0" domain="NonNegativeReal"/> </diversificationRate> <diversificationRateAmongDemes id="diversificationRateAmongDemesSPFBD.t:$(n)" spec="bdmmprime.parameterization.SkylineMatrixParameter" typeSet="@typeSetBDMMPrime.t:$(n)" timesAreAges="true"> <processLength idref="processLengthBDMMPrime.t:$(n)"/> <skylineValues id="diversificationRateAmongDemesFBD.t:$(n)" spec="beast.base.spec.inference.parameter.RealVectorParam" value="0.0" domain="NonNegativeReal" estimate="false"/> </diversificationRateAmongDemes> <turnover id="turnoverSPFBD.t:$(n)" spec="bdmmprime.parameterization.SkylineVectorParameter" typeSet="@typeSetBDMMPrime.t:$(n)" timesAreAges="true"> <processLength idref="processLengthBDMMPrime.t:$(n)"/> <skylineValues id="turnoverFBD.t:$(n)" spec="beast.base.spec.inference.parameter.RealVectorParam" value="0.8" domain="UnitInterval"/> </turnover> <migrationRate id="migrationRateSPFBD.t:$(n)" spec="bdmmprime.parameterization.SkylineMatrixParameter" typeSet="@typeSetBDMMPrime.t:$(n)" timesAreAges="true"> <processLength idref="processLengthBDMMPrime.t:$(n)"/> <skylineValues id="migrationRateFBD.t:$(n)" spec="beast.base.spec.inference.parameter.RealVectorParam" value="1.0" domain="NonNegativeReal" estimate="false"/> </migrationRate> <samplingProportion id="samplingProportionSPFBD.t:$(n)" spec="bdmmprime.parameterization.SkylineVectorParameter" typeSet="@typeSetBDMMPrime.t:$(n)" timesAreAges="true"> <processLength idref="processLengthBDMMPrime.t:$(n)"/> <skylineValues id="samplingProportionFBD.t:$(n)" spec="beast.base.spec.inference.parameter.RealVectorParam" value="0.1" domain="UnitInterval"/> </samplingProportion>
<rhoSampling id="rhoSamplingProbSPFBD.t:$(n)" spec="bdmmprime.parameterization.TimedParameter" typeSet="@typeSetBDMMPrime.t:$(n)" timesAreAges="true"> <processLength idref="processLengthBDMMPrime.t:$(n)"/> </rhoSampling> </parameterization>
<param id="diversificationRateChangeTimesFBD.t:$(n)" spec="beast.base.spec.inference.parameter.RealVectorParam" value="1.0" domain="Real" estimate="false"/> <param id="diversificationRateAmongDemesChangeTimesFBD.t:$(n)" spec="beast.base.spec.inference.parameter.RealVectorParam" value="1.0" domain="Real" estimate="false"/> <param id="turnoverChangeTimesFBD.t:$(n)" spec="beast.base.spec.inference.parameter.RealVectorParam" value="1.0" domain="Real" estimate="false"/> <param id="migrationRateChangeTimesFBD.t:$(n)" spec="beast.base.spec.inference.parameter.RealVectorParam" value="1.0" domain="Real" estimate="false"/> <param id="samplingProportionChangeTimesFBD.t:$(n)" spec="beast.base.spec.inference.parameter.RealVectorParam" value="1.0" domain="Real" estimate="false"/>
<param id="rhoSamplingProbFBD.t:$(n)" spec="beast.base.spec.inference.parameter.RealVectorParam" value="0.0" domain="UnitInterval" estimate="false"/> <param id="rhoSamplingProbTimesFBD.t:$(n)" spec="beast.base.spec.inference.parameter.RealVectorParam" value="0.0" domain="Real" estimate="false"/>
